name: Microwave Lasagna
directions: Brown the ground beef, mix with spaghetti sauce and 1/2 cup of water.
Set aside (I do not always use meat).
In a large deep Rock'N'Server pan (from tupperware) or a large rectangular microwavable pan, pour 1/4 of the sauce.
Layer 3 noodles on top and spread 1/2 the cottage/ricatto cheese on top of this.
Sprinkle with parmesan and 1/3 of the mozzarella.
Pour 1/2 of the remaining sauce mix on top and put the last 3 noddles top of the sauce.
Sprinkle with parmesan and 1/3 of the mozzarella.
Pour on the remaining sauce.
Cook on high for 8 minutes, medium for 25 minutes.
Sprinkle on the remaining mozzarella, and cook an additional 2 minutes.
Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.

similar.name: Breaded Fish Fillets a La Microwave

name: Breaded Fish Fillets a La Microwave
directions: Fold the thinner fillet ends under to the center and place and place spoke fashion around the outside of a 9 or 12 inch dish.
Combine remaining ingredients and spread evenly over the fillets.
Cook on high 4-6 minutes or until done.

name: The Best Microwave S'mores Ever
directions: Toast graham crackers in toaster until slightly toasted (lightly tanned), checking crackers periodically as your toaster may have a different darkness setting.

Break each cracker in half, place the halves onto a microwavable plate, and place each half of Hershey's bar or about 2 handfuls of semisweet chocolate chips onto two of the cracker halves and a marshmallow or about 10 mini marshmallows onto each of the remaining cracker halves.
Microwave at 50% power for 20 seconds, remove plate and turn marshmallow cracker halves over onto chocolate cracker halves and microwave at 50% power for 20 seconds more.
Enjoy!
For best results, eat with a friend while singing campfire songs!

similar.name: Breaded Fish Fillets a La Microwave

name: Brenda's Sweet Snack Mix (microwave)
directions: Mix margarine, brown sugar, white syrup and 1/8 teaspoons salt together in a microwavable bowl.
Microwave on high for 2 minutes.
Stir well.
Microwave on high for another 2 minutes.
Add 1 teaspoons vanilla and 1 teaspoons baking soda.
Stir until clear.
Pour crispix into brown paper bag.
Pour syrup mixture over all.
Stir well and shake brown bag.
Microwave 1 1/2 minutes.
Shake well again.
Microwave another 1 1/2 minutes Shake again.
Add peanuts and pretzels.
Shake again.
Spread onto large sheet of wax paper or large cookie sheet.
Cool well.
Add m&m's and butter scotch chips.
Mix together.
See the bowl empty before your eyes!

name: Best Ever Microwave Play Dough
directions: Mix dry ingredients together in a microwavable bowl.
Add water, oil and food colouring and stir well.

microwave on HIGH for between 3-6 minutes (30 seconds each if divided into ramekins for different colours).  Stir well at 2 minute intervals until a consistency similar to that of mashed potato is achieved.
Allow to cool sufficiently before kneading well.
Play dough can be stored in an airtight container.

similar.name: Breaded Fish Fillets a La Microwave

name: Vanilla Berry  Play Dough
directions: You will need 2 bowls; one large microwave safe and one medium plastic.  Also, you will need a wooden or silicon spatula.
In the large bowl mix 2 cups flour, salt, and tartar; set aside.
In the medium bowl pour in the boiled water and steep tea bags for 5 min's. Next, remove tea bags and add vanilla and oil, stir together gently.
Combine the tea mix into the flour mixture in thirds, stirring after each addition.  *The dough should be almost the consistency of cake batter*
Place bowl in microwave and cook on High for six, 45 second intervals stirring after each interval  or until dough is partially cooked.  **CAREFUL IT'S HOT**.

Add in last 2 cups of flour 1/2 cup at a time (as you may not need all of the flour) Stir until dough is stiff but soft. Carefully knead dough(*careful it's still hot) with hands until flour is incorporated.  Let dough cool on counter top for about 3 min's.

To Test Readiness:  Take palm full of dough and knead it in you hands for 30 seconds.  Then, flatten it on the counter top -- if it leaves dough behind, add a bit more flour, if it comes off the counter clean it's ready!
Seal in an air tight container.

name: Teenager Glitter Gloss
directions: Mix the beeswax, oil and honey in a heat-resistant container.
Heat gently in the microwave or water bath until the beeswax melts completely.
Stir in glitter.
Pour this prepared mixture into a small jar or lip gloss container.
Allow it to cool completely.
To use: Spread the prepared glitter gloss on your lips in one direction.
Note: If using this as a body gloss, be sure to avoid the area around the eyes.
